title: cibica: Robust Gradient-Free Circle Estimation for Motion-Blurred Clinical Video
description: Reference implementation of CIBICA, a gradient-free combinatorial circle estimation method for low-resolution, motion-blurred clinical video, together with classical and robust baselines (Circle Hough Transform, Randomized Hough Transform, Random Circle Detection, robust algebraic fitting), the 18 preprocessing configurations, the Jaccard-based evaluation, the nonparametric statistical comparison, and the scripts that regenerate every figure and table in the accompanying manuscript.

creators.name: Román Catafau, Esteban
